title: Oil: Brent $98.48 (+3%), WTI $92.13 (+3%) — then after-hours drop on ceasefire extension
snippet: CNBC reports oil markets rose during the trading session: Brent $98.48 (+3%), WTI $92.13 (+3%) on Iran uncertainty. After-hours, prices reversed: WTI fell 1.1% to $88.60, Brent dropped 0.6% to $94.89 following Trump's ceasefire extension announcement. S&P, Nasdaq, and Dow all closed down approximately 0.6%.
tag_reason: 4/21 당일 유가와 시장 데이터는 날짜별 고유 정보. 장중 상승 후 시간외 하락의 이중 패턴은 신규.

entities.name: Oil Price Apr 21 (up then after-hours down)
